# looker_folder (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "looker_folder" "my_folder" {
  name      = "My Custom Folder"
  parent_id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `parent_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
